details.remarks: Tolerant to major diseases. Drought tolerance.
Productive hybrid, good for transport and storage.
High yielding big long size hybrid.
Best for high yield andSucculent spears.
Productive & tolerant to papaya ring spot virus.
Stands 30 days without cracking or losing color.
Crispy and tasty along with good keeping quality.
Good stand after maturity without cracking.
Excellent chapati quality, aroma and taste.
Without cracking and without fibre development.
